_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression.

_contextSnippet: GFP+ tumor cells incorporated BrdU at a significantly slower rate and only reached near saturating levels of GFP and BrdU coexpression on day 20 of the pulse period
details: GFP+ tumor cells incorporated BrdU at significantly slower rate, reaching near saturating levels only on day 20 of pulse period
